raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Tapehz ta fakka tas
KUNGS: Tu no tahs Gustas
ne nahksi/ us ko tu gulli/ bet tu
teeschaim nomirft. Un Elijas
gabje nohft.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Ta nahze tee Wehstneschi
atpakkat pee winna/ un wiꞥſch
fazzija us teemi: Par ko juhs
nahkat atpakkat?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Un tee fazzija us winnu:
Weens Wihrs nahze mums pret-
ti/ un fazzija us mums: Eita/
greesetees atpakkat pee to Kehni-
xu/ kas juhs irr fuhtijs/ un run-
najt us to: Ta fakka tas KUNgs:
Woj tad ne irr weens Deews
eckſch Israëta/ ka tu fuhti Baäl-
Seebubu to Deewu no Ekrona
waizahrt? tapehz tu no tuhs Gustas
ne nahksi/ us ko tu eegullees/
bet tu teeschaim nomirft.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Un wiꞥſch fazzija us teem:
Rahds Gihmis bija tam Wihr-
ram/ kas jums pretti nahze/ un
ſchohs Wahrdus us jums run-
naja ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un tee fazzija us winnu:
Tam Wihrain bija spalwainae
Drebbes/ un ar weenn Ahdas
Johstu bija wiꞥſch apjohſees ap
faweem Gurneem. Tad fazzi-
ja wiꞥſch: Tas irr Elijas tas
Tisbiteris.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Un wiꞥſch fuhtija pee ta
weenu Wirfneeku pahr peezdef-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "miteem/ lihds ar winna peezdef-
mituem. Un tad tas pee winna
us augſchu nahze/ raugi/ tad
fehdeja winsch us ta Kalna Wirs-
Gallu/ un tas fazzija us to:
Tu Deewa Wihrs/tas Kehninsch
leek tew fazziht: Nahz leija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Bet Elijas atbildeja/ un
fazzija us to Wirfneeku pahr
peezdefiniteem : Ja es weens
Deewa Wihrs ejmu/ tad laid
Ugguns friht no Debbes/ un tew
ar taweem peezdefiniteem aprihj/
tad kritte Ugguns no Deb-
bes/ un aprihje winnu/ un win-
na peezdefinitus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Bet wiꞥſch fuhtija atkak
us to wehl zittu Wirfneeku pahr
peezdefiniteem/ lihds ar winna
peezdefiniteem/ un tas atbildeja /
un fazzija us to: Tu Deewa
Wihrs/ ta fakka tas Kehninsch :
Nahz drihs leija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Bet Elijas atbildeja/ un
fazzija us teem: Ja es weens
Deewa Wihrs ejmu/ tad laid
Ugguns friht no Debbes/ un tew
ar taweem peezdefiniteem aprihj.
Tad kritte tas Deewa Ugguns
no Debbes/ un aprihje winnu
ar jaweem peezdefiniteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Bet tas fuhtija atkak tre-
schu Reisi weenu Wirfneeku pahr
peezdefiniteem/ lihds ar winna
peezdefiniteem. Ta nahze tas
tretchajs Wirfneeks pahr peez-
definiteem augſcham/ un peez-
gabje/ un mettehs Zeltos preeftch
Elijasu/ un peeluhdse to/ un fazz-
zija us to: Tu Deewa Wihrs/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
